# Conductor Orchestrator Agent

This agent resolves issues by coordinating with a planner subagent that generates subissues. It efficiently handles the orchestration of tasks to ensure that all components of the project are aligned and working cohesively.

## Functionality
- **Resolve Issues**: The conductor orchestrator listens for incoming issues and manages them effectively.
- **Call Planner Subagent**: When an issue is identified, it triggers the planner subagent to evaluate the problem and create necessary subissues.
- **Monitor Progress**: The orchestrator keeps track of the generated subissues and ensures that they are addressed in a timely manner.

## Usage
- Integrate this agent into your existing project structure to enhance issue resolution capabilities.
